name: autonomous-builder
description: Autonomously plans, implements, and reviews multi-step work in a codebase. An orchestrator agent drafts a phased plan (with per-task acceptance criteria), gets the user's approval, then runs each task through an implementer and a reviewer with adaptive retry, plan-revision on PLAN_WRONG, and per-phase user checkpoints. Hardened for use in large or legacy codebases via a shared Discoveries log and tiered (cheap/gate) acceptance criteria.
